Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in cases that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time for Payment Handled in process variants that contain at least one rejection by PRE_APPROVER versus those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time between Request Payment and Payment Handled grouped by whether the case previously experienced a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time for Payment Handled in successful cases (ending with Payment Handled) that never encountered any rejection activity
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Payment Handled in variants that bypassed PRE_APPROVER entirely
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Payment Handled compared to total time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to Payment Handled in re-submitted cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time it takes Payment Handled to be done after the final approval step, stratified by the number of prior rejections by PRE_APPROVER (0, 1, ≥2)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time from the last occurrence of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in traces that previously had a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average duration of the entire process (from first Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled) in variants where Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurred versus variants without any PRE_APPROVER involvement
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time between Request Payment and Payment Handled in cases that followed the variant path including Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER versus those that skipped PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time to Payment Handled grouped by the presence or absence of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER earlier in the trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total resolution time of Payment Handled in cases that required re-submission after Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER, measured from the original submission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Payment Handled in high-frequency variants (e.g., top 3 most common) that do not involve PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Payment Handled in successful traces that did not experience any rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time from the second (or later) Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in traces that initially suffered a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'
